title: publish-new-version
outOfScope: Publishing any tag other than v0.5.31.
Publishing before all release evidence checks pass.

riskAssessment.reason: Release changes are externally visible and must be bound to verified source and evidence.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized the approved implementation loop.

preReviewWarnings: Verify version, source commit, candidate, release evidence, and install smoke bindings.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Release metadata declares v0.5.31 and matches the candidate release contract.
Release distribution, workflow, smoke, compatibility, and supply-chain checks pass.
Published release evidence is bound to the verified main source commit.
guidelines: Release metadata and evidence are source-commit bound.
Do not publish when any release-blocking verification fails.

intent.problem: All approved stabilization Work Items are complete and the next candidate must be published from verified main.
constraints: Require complete release evidence before tag/release publication.
intent.rationale: A final source-bound release closes the review loop and enables plan cleanup.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Release evidence is bound to main source commit
Install and upgrade smoke succeed for published version

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized the full approved implementation loop, including release metadata and workflow publication steps.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
